summary: test_bulk_respawn_binding_lists_only_down_tasks_for_confirmation exercises the real _bulk_respawn_line via rendered modal text and covers every boundary: 8-char id truncation, dash for unset slug, memo omitted when None, whitespace normalization, exact-60-char memo with no ellipsis, and a 61-char-after-normalization memo forcing normalize-before-truncate ordering.
